description_long: This is a plush, lavender-colored stuffed toy resembling a cartoon rabbit, with a rounded body, short limbs, and large upright ears. The toy features a white face and belly, with a dark nose and subtle, embroidered eyes that give it a gentle, friendly appearance. A blue headband adorned with a single blue flower and a pink center sits between its ears, adding a playful accessory. The surface texture appears soft and slightly fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the seams are visible along the limbs and body. The back of the toy is plain, with the headband and flower visible from behind. The overall design is cute and whimsical, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or play areas.
description: A lavender plush rabbit with large upright ears, a blue flower headband, and a soft, fuzzy texture. It has a white face and belly, and a gentle, friendly expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rabbit's face, white belly, blue flower headband, and both upright ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the protruding ear, and the blue flower accessory.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain lavender back, the headband, and both ears from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, ear, and the blue flower accessory from the opposite side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and neutral, with small, embroidered eyes and a dark nose. There is no visible mouth, giving it a calm and serene appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly out to the sides and both legs apart, ears pointing straight up.
